verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Shepherd of my soul I give You full control, Wherever You may lead I will follow. I have made the choice To listen for Your voice, Wherever You may lead I will go.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Be it in a quiet pasture Or by a gentle stream, The Shepherd of my soul is by my side. Should I face a mighty mountain Or a valley dark and deep, The Shepherd of my soul will be my guide.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Shepherd of my soul Oh You have made me whole, Where’er I hear You call How my tears flow. How I feel Your love How I want to serve I gladly give my heart to You, O Lord.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Be it in the flowing river Or in the quiet night, The Shepherd of my soul is by my side. Should I face the stormy weather Or the dangers of this world. The Shepherd of my soul will be my guide.
